summary: Frontend testing of Availability tab and CalendarCheck2 icon change. All features working correctly. DB had professional users so the Availability grid was shown with 3 professionals and 15 Add buttons. Session modal opens with date pre-filled when clicking Add. Note: admin_emailauth@test.com password was reset (hash mismatch in DB) before testing could proceed.
test_credentials: admin_emailauth@test.com / password — password hash was reset in DB as it was mismatched. Login now works.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Availability tab features verified: CalendarCheck2 icon in nav, 4 tabs (Schedule/Ongoing/Completed/Availability), week nav with arrows and label, professional rows (Admin/Counsellor, Test Professional, Teacher to Prof), Add buttons in Mon-Fri cells, Session Log modal opens with date pre-filled. All 3 prior tabs still functional. No issues found.
passed_tests: CalendarCheck2 icon present in Appointments nav sidebar
4 tabs present: Schedule, Ongoing, Completed, Availability
Week navigation label shows '30 Mar – 5 Apr 2026' with prev/next arrows
3 professional rows displayed with avatar, name, professional_type
15 Add buttons present in availability cells
Clicking Add opens Log Session modal with date pre-filled (03/30/2026)
Schedule, Ongoing, Completed tabs still work
